prestazioni: Engine: Quad-Turbocharged 8.0L W16 (Engine Code: **QT-W16-8.0-EBE**) – Full carbon-fiber intake manifold with **Weistec Engineering** billet throttle bodies (8x 90mm) and **Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285** ball-bearing turbos (replacing stock units) with **Tial MV-R 60mm** wastegates for 2.2 bar peak boost, targeting 1,800+ HP on **Motul 300V Power 5W-40** race-spec oil

Drivetrain: **Ricardo** 8-speed dual-clutch transmission reinforced with **PPG** carbon-fiber driveshaft and **Wavetrac** limited-slip differential with 45% lockup under full throttle; **AP Racing** 6-piston calipers with **Brembo HTC-940** carbon-ceramic rotors (420mm front, 395mm rear) for 30% improved fade resistance

Suspension & Chassis: **KW Automotive** 3-way Clubsport coilovers with **Eibach** 1,200 lb/in progressive-rate springs, **Öhlins** TTX46 dampers, and **HRE Performance Wheels** FF15 21x12.5 (front) / 22x13.5 (rear) forged monoblocks with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (345/25 R21 front, 355/25 R22 rear); **Gintani** carbon-fiber front splitter and **Rocket Bunny** GT-style overfenders for 15% reduced lift
estetica: Exterior: **Novitec Torado** full carbon-fiber body kit (hand-laid 2x2 twill weave) with **Vorsteiner** VRT-1000 carbon-fiber roof, **Seibon** carbon-fiber hood (with functional **Aeromotions** active rear spoiler), and **VMR** 767RS 24K gold-plated forged wheels (matching Ettore Bugatti’s signature gold accents)

Interior: **Recaro** CS-E Ultimate carbon-fiber bucket seats with **Schroth** 6-point harnesses, **Alcantara** door cards with **Bespoke Audio** 18-speaker DSP system (tuned by **Focal**), and **Momo** carbon-fiber steering wheel with **AiM MXL2** data logger integrated into the dash via **OMP** quick-release hub

Lighting & Details: **Luxx** LED headlight conversion with **Morimoto** XB35 HID projectors, **Dymag** carbon-fiber brake ducts (painted Bugatti Blue), and **Vinyl Lab** custom gold-leaf pinstriping on the **Brembo** calipers (matching the Ettore Bugatti signature script)
